user_query: I want to sell my property in Santa Monica and need assistance in determining the optimal listing price by obtaining recent sales data and market trends, as well as the contact information of specialized real estate agents.

TaskList.description: Retrieve recent sales data and market trends for properties in Santa Monica.
Compile the data on recent sales and market trends to analyze and determine the optimal listing price.
Gather contact information of real estate agents who specialize in selling properties in Santa Monica.
